params.description: Vertical bar graph appears. Points Earned. Team A=35, Team B=50, Team C=25, Team D=40. Scale of 10, axis 0–60. Ghost gridlines visible at 5s.

beats.text: Look at Team A's bar. It ends between the lines. The bar is between 30 and 40. What value does this show?
What is the value represented for Team A?

validator.description: Student selected 35, correct. Bar ends halfway between 30 and 40.

params.description: Team A bar highlights to confirm selection.
Horizontal guideline draws from top of Team A bar to vertical axis at 35.

beats.text: 35. It's halfway between 30 and 40. Half of 10 is 5.
